steps.description: Rust integration test for Lock flow
steps.command: cd src/api/api && SQLX_OFFLINE=true cargo test --test sequence_e2e_test seq1_lock -- --nocapture
steps.expected: All backend integration test assertions pass: Lock Request is accepted by L3, Dilithium signature is verified, nonce and expiry are validated, SR_0 is computed as SHA3-256("QS_LOCK_V1" || chain_id || asset || amount || dest_addr || expiry || nonce || pk_dilithium), a lock_id is issued, the lock record is written to DB, and the L1 Vault lockWithSR0 transaction is submitted — cargo test exits 0 with no FAILED lines in output

steps.description: Playwright integration spec for Consumer Lock
steps.command: cd src/frontend/web && npx playwright test e2e/integration/lock.integration.spec.ts --reporter=json
steps.expected: All Playwright test cases pass: the UI Lock creation flow completes without error, the UI reflects a success state, and a corresponding DB row for the lock is observable — npx playwright exits 0 with 0 failed tests in the JSON reporter output

steps.description: Verify lock row was created during this run window, pk_dilithium populated, and L1 submission was attempted
steps.command: psql "$DATABASE_URL" -t -A -c "SELECT lock_id, status, length(pk_dilithium), l1_tx_hash IS NOT NULL AS l1_submitted FROM locks WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;"
steps.expected: Exactly one row is returned from the last 5-minute window; status must be one of {pending, locked, confirmed}; pk_dilithium length must be exactly 1952 bytes (Dilithium public key size); l1_submitted must be t (true) when the L1 Vault is reachable — any deviation (zero rows, wrong pk_dilithium length, l1_submitted=f when L1 is reachable) is a hard failure

steps.description: Verify the lock created in this run is anchored on L1 (receipt status==0x1)
steps.command:
bash -c '
set -eo pipefail
LOCK_ID=$(psql "$DATABASE_URL" -t -A -c "SELECT lock_id FROM locks WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '"'"'5 minutes'"'"' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;" | tr -d " ")
TX_HASH=$(psql "$DATABASE_URL" -t -A -c "SELECT l1_tx_hash FROM locks WHERE lock_id = '"'"'$LOCK_ID'"'"';" | tr -d " ")
if [ -z "$TX_HASH" ] || [ "$TX_HASH" = "" ]; then
  echo "FAIL: lock $LOCK_ID has no l1_tx_hash (L1 anchoring did not occur in this run; QS__L1_PRIVATE_KEY may be unset)"
  echo "Total locked snapshot for context (should be unchanged from prior runs):"
  cast call 0x07012aeF87C6E423c32F2f8eaF81762f63337260 "totalLocked()(uint256)" --rpc-url "$L1_RPC_URL" || true
  exit 1
fi
echo "checking L1 receipt for tx=$TX_HASH (lock=$LOCK_ID)"
RECEIPT_STATUS=$(cast receipt "$TX_HASH" --rpc-url "$L1_RPC_URL" --json 2>/dev/null | jq -r ".status // \"missing\"" || echo "missing")
echo "receipt status: $RECEIPT_STATUS"
case "$RECEIPT_STATUS" in
  0x1|1) echo "PASS: lock anchored on L1"; exit 0 ;;
  0x0|0) echo "FAIL: tx reverted on L1"; exit 1 ;;
  missing) echo "FAIL: tx not found on L1 (tx submitted but never mined, or wrong RPC)"; exit 1 ;;
  *) echo "FAIL: unexpected receipt status $RECEIPT_STATUS"; exit 1 ;;
esac
'
steps.expected: Script exits 0 and prints "PASS: lock anchored on L1" — the most recent locks row has a non-empty l1_tx_hash and cast receipt for that hash returns status 0x1; any other receipt status (0x0, missing, or unexpected) or an absent l1_tx_hash is a hard failure

acceptance_criteria: Backend integration test (seq1_lock) exits 0 with no FAILED assertions: Dilithium signature verification passes, nonce is unique, expiry is valid, SR_0 is correctly computed, lock_id is issued, and L1 lockWithSR0 is submitted
Playwright lock.integration.spec.ts exits 0 with 0 failed tests: the UI lock creation flow reaches success state and a DB row is produced
A locks row exists created within the last 5 minutes with status in {pending, locked, confirmed}, pk_dilithium column length exactly equals 1952, and l1_tx_hash IS NOT NULL
The L1 transaction recorded in l1_tx_hash has receipt status exactly 0x1 on the configured L1 RPC — a reverted (0x0) or missing transaction is a hard failure
L1 Vault totalLocked is non-zero after the lock is anchored, confirming assets were received by the Vault contract
No silent fallback or hardcoded address appears in the execution trace — all contract addresses and RPC URLs must be sourced from environment variables or configuration
